content: async-graphql-axum 7.2.1 axum integration: Router::new().route('/graphql', get(graphiql_handler).post_service(GraphQL::new(schema))). GraphQL::new(schema) wraps schema as Tower Service for POST. GraphiQL: Html(GraphiQLSource::build().endpoint('/graphql').finish()). GraphQLRequest extractor destructures as GraphQLRequest(req) in handler. GraphQLResponse from schema.execute(req).await.into(). Requires axum ^0.8.1.
